title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 452.607 - Confidentiality of facts obtained at sessions not considered in adjudication, exception
text:
452.607.  Confidentiality of facts obtained at sessions not considered in adjudication, exception. — The facts adduced at any educational session resulting from a referral pursuant to the provisions of sections 452.600 to 452.610 shall not be considered in the adjudication of a pending or subsequent judicial proceeding, nor shall any report resulting from such educational session, except a certification for completion of the session, become part of the record of any judicial proceeding unless the parties have stipulated in writing to the contrary.
(L. 1993 H.B. 353 § 1 subsec. 3)
